flagged_claims.source_evidence: Current medication: Metformin 850mg every 12 hours, Enalapril 5mg/day
flagged_claims.explanation: Source note lists only two medications (Metformin and Enalapril); Glibenclamide does not appear anywhere in the clinical note and is directly contradicted by the complete medication list.

flagged_claims.source_evidence: Current medication: Metformin 850mg every 12 hours, Enalapril 5mg/day
flagged_claims.explanation: Glibenclamide is not present in the source medication list; any dosing claim for this drug is directly contradicted by the absence of the medication and the explicit enumeration of current prescriptions.

flagged_claims.claim_text: Medication hallucination in summary: Glibenclamide 5mg/day appears in the summary but is NOT present in the source note. This is a fabricated medication that could cause patient harm (hypoglycemia risk, especially dangerous in a 67-year-old).
flagged_claims.source_evidence: Current medication: Metformin 850mg every 12 hours, Enalapril 5mg/day

aegis_export.flawed_summary: Female patient, 67 years old, with type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Suboptimal glycemic control (HbA1c 7.2%). Medications: Metformin 850mg q12h, Enalapril 5mg/day, Glibenclamide 5mg/day. Follow-up in 3 months.
aegis_export.corrected_summary: Female patient, 67 years old, with type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Suboptimal glycemic control (HbA1c 7.2%). Medications: Metformin 850mg q12h, Enalapril 5mg/day. Follow-up in 3 months.
